title: Apodokimos SBT Reputation Specification
description: Machine-readable specification for Soulbound Token reputation system (P-09)

design_principles.identity_bound: Attached to DID, not address or token balance
design_principles.non_transferable: Cannot be sold, delegated, or concentrated
design_principles.field_specific: Score in clinical medicine ≠ governance weight in mathematics
design_principles.earned_through_survival: Score increments on validated claims/attestations; decrements on refutations

mint.description: Minimal SBT entry establishing DID-to-chain linkage

increment_attestation_validated.trigger: Claim attested as Supports/Replicates later receives independent confirmation

increment_claim_survived.trigger: Submitted claim reaches survival milestone (e.g., 5 independent replications, O factor confirmed)

decrement_retraction.trigger: Submitted claim retracted or supported claim refuted

non_transferability.enforcement_level: Runtime level — transfer extrinsic absent from dispatchable function set
non_transferability.technical_mechanism: pallet-sbt-reputation has no transfer extrinsic, not merely gated by access control
non_transferability.consequence: No code path exists for SBT score transfer

base_increment.description: Base score change per lifecycle event

submitter_multiplier.description: Extra penalty for claim submitters vs attesters
